interactive.rationale: 4 interactive controls wired to script logic — well past the static-card threshold.

references.rationale: The 'see also' section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5082469066604544 — matches the feature.

design_system.rationale: Inline styles route through --bg/--text/--accent variables, no raw hex, and button overrides pair background + color correctly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept's lede mirrors the feature index promise — same nouns, same scope.

spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the keywords the spec/feature-index lede surfaces — covers the headline API surface.

edge_cases.rationale: The live readout now shows computed manual animation timing and that the invalid none keyword is rejected.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: changed blink rate to 1250ms and timing to linear, then focused the custom editor. The readout showed computed caret-animation manual, 1.25s duration, linear timing, and CSS.supports('caret-animation: none') false; console/network were clean.
